message:
perf(sync): relax notify CAS failure ordering + #[inline] try_* methods

Relax compare_exchange_weak failure ordering from Acquire to Relaxed in
notify stored_notifications CAS loop — success Acquire suffices since
failure just retries. Add #[inline] to Mutex::try_lock,
RwLock::try_read/try_write, Semaphore::try_acquire for cross-crate
inlining of contention-critical fast paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
